---
description: 'Astro Starlight development standards for the gears.dev documentation site'
applyTo: '**/*.astro, **/*.ts, **/*.js, **/*.mjs, **/*.md, **/*.mdx'
---

# gears.dev development instructions

This is the [gears.dev](https://gears.dev) documentation site, built with
[Astro Starlight](https://starlight.astro.build/). Unlike a monorepo, this is a
**single package at the repository root** (there is no `src/frontend/`).

## Project stack

- **Astro 6.x** with the **Starlight** documentation theme
- **TypeScript** strict mode (`astro/tsconfigs/strict`)
- **Static site generation** (SSG) — zero client-side JS by default
- **pnpm 11.8** as the package manager; **Node ≥ 22.13**
- **i18n** via Starlight `locales` with **Lunaria** translation tracking

## Running locally

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev        # dev server at http://localhost:4321
```

Search is disabled in `dev`; use `pnpm build && pnpm preview` to exercise it.

## Quality gates (run before pushing)

```bash
pnpm check      # astro check — type & content validation
pnpm lint:md    # markdownlint-cli2 (config: .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc)
pnpm build      # production build; also emits the /i18n Lunaria dashboard
pnpm links      # linkinator dead-link check against ./dist
```

## Repository layout

- `src/content/docs/` — all documentation (`.md` / `.mdx`). Sidebar sections are
  autogenerated per directory; order pages with frontmatter `sidebar.order`.
- `src/components/` — custom Astro components (`ApiSignature`, `ConceptDiagram`,
  `StatusBadge`, `Terminal`, and `lunaria/Dashboard`).
- `src/styles/theme.css` — Constructor brand tokens (do not hardcode colors;
  use the `--gears-*` tokens).
- `astro.config.mjs` — Starlight config: locales, `editLink`, the Lunaria plugin.
- `lunaria.config.json` — translation-status config (locales must mirror
  `astro.config.mjs`).
- `config/lunaria-starlight.mjs` — vendored Starlight→Lunaria plugin.

## Content conventions

- Use **sentence case** for headings; clear, concise, active voice.
- Internal links are **root-relative** (e.g. `/concepts/runtime-and-lifecycle/`),
  never absolute `http://localhost` or `https://gears.dev` links.
- Use Starlight asides (`:::note`, `:::tip`, `:::caution`, `:::danger`).
- Code blocks may use `title="..."` and line highlighting `{2}`.
- Use `.mdx` (not `.md`) when a page imports components.

## i18n & translations

- `defaultLocale: 'root'` keeps English at `/` (no `/en/` prefix). **Do not change
  this** — it would break every internal link and the link-checker.
- Add a language with one line in `astro.config.mjs` `locales`, a matching entry in
  `lunaria.config.json`, and a `src/content/docs/<lang>/` directory mirroring the
  English file tree (same paths/filenames so Lunaria can pair them).
- `editLink.baseUrl` points at the **upstream** repo
  (`constructorfabric/gears-rust-web-docs`), not a fork.

## Gotcha: Lunaria needs committed files

`pnpm build` computes translation freshness from **git history**, so it fails if
the working tree has uncommitted changes to tracked `src/content/docs/**` files.
Commit before running `pnpm build` locally. CI uses `fetch-depth: 0` so full
history is available.
